notes: Defective Rapid Response Content update released for Windows hosts.
Microsoft estimated 8.5 million Windows devices were affected.
Microsoft said the affected devices were less than 1% of all Windows machines.
Delta publicly said 1.3 million customers were disrupted.

metric: Delta flights cancelled over five days
notes: Delta publicly said about 7,000 flights were cancelled over five days.
Delta publicly said the outage cost roughly $500 million.
